rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. For the counsel to submit the proposed order. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EDUARDA O. BUTAC
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 03/27/2023, pending a disposition of the related heirship petition. The following issues have not been addressed since the initial hearing on 12/12/2022: 1) No courtesy copy of the petition has been received. 2) No proposed order has been received. 3) No original statements of the bank accounts listed on Schedule F have been filed. See LRSF 14.34(D). 4) A copy of the petition must be served on the person who requested special notice. Item 5 of the proof of service attached to the DE-120 form must be checked. See Probate Code section 1252(a). 5) A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(D)(6) must be attached to and served with the DE-120 form. 6) Please file a copy of the closing escrow statement for the sale of the estate real property.

rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/10/23. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: Proof of payment of the assessment fee must be filed before an accounting can be approved. (It appears that the filing fee could also be paid at this time.) What happened to the miscellaneous personal property reported in the Supplemental I&A filed on 3/11/21? (This accounting should have begun with the balance on hand at the end of the first accounting and then shown on an additional schedule the new assets reported on the supplemental I&As filed since that first accounting.) The Discover statement for the period 7/2/19 - 9/30/19 does not support the amount shown in the I&A filed on 5/19/22. It appears that the accounting might need to be amended. Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by 3/29/23. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF NANCY NGAI YING CHEW
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/17/23. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: The I&A filed on 6/8/22 indicates that at the time of her death, the decedent had $155,000 representing Final Cash Distribution from Estate of Frank Chew. There was no such distribution from his estate. The order for final distribution in case PES-19-302573 signed on 4/23/21 ordered $283,785.53 net cash (as of 11/30/19) to be distributed to this executor. Paragraph 18 of the petition is erroneous: all heirs of the decedent did not waive the accounting; the trustee of the devisee trust, who is this executor, waived the accounting. The verification of the petition is incompletely dated. It appears that the petition must be AMENDED to disclose all of the assets that have come into this estate. Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by 4/6/23. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 3/13/2023. Statutory (ordinary) compensation calculation appears incorrect. Please review and submit a verified supplement to petition along with a new proposed order. Petition explains the outstanding debts; however, petition does not allege how the estate will resolve the receivable debts.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE JAMES M. ARTHURS TRUST DATED OCTOBER 9, 2015
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Confirmation Of Trust Assets
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/17/23. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: The issue was not who the "beneficiaries of the decedent" are but whether the predeceased son James Dale Arthurs was survived by issue. This must be set forth in a verified supplement. If he was survived by issue, they must be clearly identified in the supplement, along with their addresses, and they are entitled to personal service of notice. [Probate Code Sect. 17203(b).] Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address this issue must be received by the assigned Examiner by 4/6/23. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 3/20/2023. Please supplement the following information (1) Petition to include Attachment 7 setting forth the basis for determining that property should pass or be confirmed to the surviving spouse as community property. PC 13650 and LRSF 14.26. (2) Notice of Hearing [DE-120] form must be used. (3) Notice of Hearing to include directions for remote appearance and access. LRSF 14.1.D.6).

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GARY Y. TAKEOKA
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Proof of service of Summons of Will Contest/Objection not on file. PC 8250. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. Status of closing the estate is set for 3/18/2024. A petition for final distribution or a report of status with a petition requesting additional time for estate administration must be filed by 3/4/24. Appearance will be required on 3/18/24 if no petition has been filed.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF STEPHEN J. CAROLAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. Status of closing the estate is set for 4/8/2024.
